human_use_rationale: The Artifact is a human-operated mobile checkout. Its success depends on discoverability, navigation, input burden, error recovery, feedback, accessibility, touch ergonomics, interruption recovery, perceived latency, destructive-action safety, and cognitive load across cross-disability use.

candidate-c: skip-link activation left focus at BODY (target lacks tabindex=-1)
candidate-a: card-name payment field persisted to localStorage across reloads
no placementStarted guard on Place order during 500 ms busy window

objective_gates_note: All three candidates pass their frozen objective reports; qualitative scores are advisory and cannot override objective gates.
notes: Independent blind judge; no other-judge output read.
Each candidate operated in a separate fresh Playwright chromium context (mouse+touch 390x844 primary, keyboard-only, reduced-motion 390x844, and 320x568 viewports).
